name: Jujutsu kaisen
description:
Jujutsu Kaisen MEGA FULL LORE DUMP


(without manga ending/death-heavy ending stuff 😭)


THE ANCIENT BEGINNING


Long before the main story, cursed energy already existed.


Humans constantly release cursed energy unconsciously through:


fear


hatred


shame


stress


grief


jealousy



Over centuries this created:


curses


cursed objects


cursed spirits


cursed techniques


jujutsu society



The stronger humanity’s negative emotions became... the stronger curses became too.



---


HEIAN ERA — THE GOLDEN AGE


This was the peak era of jujutsu.


Sorcerers:


were more violent


stronger


more experienced


constantly fighting



And during this terrifying era appeared:


Ryomen Sukuna


Sukuna:


started as a human sorcerer


evolved into a calamity


became known as the King of Curses


defeated countless elite sorcerers



People feared him like a natural disaster.


His original body:


four arms


two faces


monstrous body



Even after death: his 20 fingers remained indestructible cursed objects.


Each finger:


attracts curses


contains insane cursed energy


revives parts of Sukuna




---


JUJUTSU SOCIETY


Modern jujutsu society is:


secretive


political


traditional


extremely strict



It is controlled by conservative higher-ups.


The society values:


inherited techniques


powerful bloodlines


clan status



Gojo hates this system deeply.



---


THE BIG THREE CLANS


THE GOJO CLAN


Mainly famous because of:


Satoru Gojo


Inherited abilities:


Six Eyes


Limitless



This combo appears once in generations.


Gojo’s birth literally shifted the balance of the world.


Curses became stronger simply because Gojo existed 😭



---


THE ZENIN CLAN


One of the harshest clans.


Values:


power


cursed techniques


prestige



Looks down on weakness brutally.


Members include:


Maki Zenin


Mai Zenin


Naobito


Naoya


Megumi technically



Main inherited technique:


Ten Shadows Technique



---


THE KAMO CLAN


Focused on:


tradition


politics


bloodline purity



Known inherited technique:


Blood Manipulation


Main member:


Noritoshi Kamo



---


CURSED ENERGY EXPLAINED


Sorcerers control cursed energy manually.


Important concepts:


output


reinforcement


efficiency


cursed technique activation



Most sorcerers reinforce:


punches


speed


durability
creator: i_am_Estoria
